import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'; import { Swiper, SwiperSlide } from 'swiper/react'; import { Pagination, Navigation, Autoplay } from 'swiper'; import 'swiper/css'; import 'swiper/css/pagination'; import 'swiper/css/navigation'; import '../styles/TestimonialsSection.css'; const TestimonialsPage = () => { const [isVisible, setIsVisible] = useState(false); const sectionRef = useRef(null); useEffect(() => { const observer = new IntersectionObserver( ([entry]) => { if (entry.isIntersecting) { setIsVisible(true); observer.unobserve(entry.target); } }, { threshold: 0.1 } ); if (sectionRef.current) { observer.observe(sectionRef.current); } return () => { if (sectionRef.current) { observer.unobserve(sectionRef.current); } }; }, []); return (

{/* Featured Success Story */}
Featured Graduate
❝

From Beginner to Lead Developer in 18 Months

"I had zero coding experience when I joined Forum Information Academy. Their step-by-step approach to teaching complex concepts and the hands-on project work gave me the confidence to apply for tech roles. Now I'm leading a development team at a fintech startup!"

Takashi Yamada Lead Developer at FinTech Solutions Web Development Graduate, 2023
{/* Main Testimonials Section */}

What Our Students Say

Discover how our programs have transformed the careers of our graduates.

{/* Testimonial 1 */}
format_quote
Web Development

"The practical approach at Forum Information Academy prepared me for real-world challenges. Within a month of graduation, I secured a position at TechCorp where I'm using the exact technologies I learned in the program."

Yuki Tanaka

Software Engineer at TechCorp

 {/* Testimonial 2 */}
format_quote
Data Science

"I switched careers from finance to data science, which seemed daunting at first. The curriculum was challenging but the instructors were incredibly supportive. The career services team helped me prepare for interviews and showcase my new skills effectively."

Hana Kimura

Data Analyst at Global Insights

 {/* Testimonial 3 */}
format_quote
Cybersecurity

"The cybersecurity program at FIA was intensive and comprehensive. We worked with real-world scenarios and the latest tools used in the industry. My certification and portfolio projects helped me stand out in a competitive job market."

Kenji Nakamura

Security Specialist at SecureNet
